instruction: In ~/Desktop/tasks_board, rename directories by replacing prefix todo_list_ with done_list_ for only Jan_1 and Jan_2. Do not rename backlog_list_Jan_3. Create ~/Desktop/tasks_board/rename_log.txt listing renamed pairs as old->new in alphabetical order.

result.command:
ok=1; [ -d ~/Desktop/tasks_board/done_list_Jan_1 ] || ok=0; [ -d ~/Desktop/tasks_board/done_list_Jan_2 ] || ok=0; [ -d ~/Desktop/tasks_board/backlog_list_Jan_3 ] || ok=0; [ ! -d ~/Desktop/tasks_board/todo_list_Jan_1 ] || ok=0; [ ! -d ~/Desktop/tasks_board/todo_list_Jan_2 ] || ok=0; expected=$(cat <<'EOF'
todo_list_Jan_1->done_list_Jan_1
todo_list_Jan_2->done_list_Jan_2
EOF
); actual=$(cat ~/Desktop/tasks_board/rename_log.txt 2>/dev/null); [ "$actual" = "$expected" ] || ok=0; if [ "$ok" = "1" ]; then echo PASS; else echo FAIL; fi
